posts.author: Kmk (kmk)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, working more with monday.com, I found the group strictions is very needed…applying a board structure to help students achive theirs homeworks missions, we need ability to set who can see each group, similar restriction already applied for column.

Please consider this…at least give this for pro plan users.
